overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character with a large backpack traversing a dark rocky canyon at night. The character emerges from a narrow passage into an open rain-swept wasteland, heading toward distant illuminated futuristic structures with vertical light beams visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage between high cliff walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow rocky canyon, the character's backpack lights glowing in the darkness

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation forming the left wall of the canyon passage
tall dark rock formation forming the right wall of the canyon passage
uneven rocky terrain forming the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow enclosed canyon with steep rock walls on both sides. The space is tight and sheltered, with limited sky visibility, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere as the character progresses forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky wasteland with distant illuminated structures visible

events.description: exits narrow canyon into expansive open wasteland landscape
rain begins falling steadily across the open terrain

agents.ego_description: jogging through the open terrain toward the distant lights on the horizon, adjusting to the open space

entered.detail: futuristic city or facility with multiple glowing lights visible on the horizon
tall vertical beams of light extending into the sky from the distant facility
dark night sky visible above the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the canyon into a vast open wasteland. The sky opens up revealing a dark night with rain beginning to fall. In the distance, an illuminated futuristic facility with vertical light beams becomes visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive rocky wasteland approaching futuristic illuminated city

events.description: character slightly adjusts trajectory while maintaining forward momentum toward the facility

agents.ego_description: continuing through the rain-swept wasteland with the illuminated facility visible ahead, navigating the rocky terrain

entered.detail: dark mountain range visible on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The character traverses the open wasteland under steady rainfall, with the distant illuminated facility now positioned to the left. The terrain remains rocky and barren, with mountain silhouettes visible on the right horizon as the journey continues toward the destination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from a claustrophobic rocky corridor into a vast, rain-swept futuristic wasteland. It begins within a narrow enclosed canyon, moving forward between steep rock walls that limit the view of the sky. As the character progresses, the tight space suddenly opens up into a wide expanse under a dark night sky where rain begins to fall, revealing an illuminated facility with vertical light beams on the distant horizon. The scene then shifts to a steady trek across the barren, rocky terrain with the glowing facility positioned to the left and dark mountain silhouettes emerging on the right.
